prompt: Create a cinematic surreal fashion-western portrait of a tall Black cowboy standing full-body in the center of a vast flower-covered hillside. The subject wears a wide-brim deep burgundy cowboy hat, a plush long velvet duster coat in dark crimson red, a white shirt underneath, leather belt and holster, and holds a polished silver double-barrel revolver angled downward across the body with both hands. The face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur, giving the figure an anonymous editorial quality. The landscape is dreamlike and color-shifted: dense lavender-purple wildflowers in the foreground, rolling hills of muted red and magenta grass behind, under a saturated bright blue sky with large soft white clouds. Use a low slightly upward camera angle, medium-wide framing, crisp daylight, strong natural contrast, realistic photography with a surreal color grade, high-fashion moodboard aesthetic, dramatic stillness, no text, no extra people.
